reference: UPON THIS HE BROUGHT ME A COTTON BAG AND GIVING IT TO ME SAID TAKE THIS BAG AND FILL IT WITH PEBBLES FROM THE BEACH AND GO FORTH WITH A COMPANY OF THE TOWNSFOLK TO WHOM I WILL GIVE A CHARGE RESPECTING THEE
text: upon this he bought me a cotton bag and given it to me said take this bag and fill it with pebbles from the beach and go forth with the company of the townsfolk to whom i will give a charge respecting thee
